caption:
The lecture hall was silent, save for the low hum of the projector and the sound of my own heartbeat. I adjusted my skirt, feeling the cool fabric of my pencil skirt brush against my thighs, a stark contrast to the heat rising within. My students were taking notes, unaware that their professor was having an entirely different kind of lecture. I ran a hand through my hair, letting it fall just so, and caught the gaze of a tall, dark-haired student. His eyes widened, and for a split second, our worlds collided. I smiled, a slow, deliberate curve of my lips, and turned back to the board. My blouse was tailored, but the fit was undeniable, accentuating the curves I worked so hard to maintain. The air in the room felt charged, the kind of energy that could only be built by anticipation. I knew, as I walked out into the hallway, that I hadn't just taught them a lesson today; I had ignited something far more thrilling. 

#ProfessorOfTheNight #UniversityLectures #AcademicTemptation #SexyTeacher #LectureHallVibes #TeachingLife #Curves #EuropeanChic #CampusSecrets #DesireInClass
